heading: Tonight
text: Widespread rain showers. Lows in the low to mid 40s, a few upper 30s over higher elevations north. Wind turning northeast at 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph.

heading: Saturday
text: Rain in central Vermont heading south, then diminishing by the afternoon with some sunshine to follow. Cool and breezy. Highs from the mid 50s to low 60s. Wind becoming north at 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph.

heading: Saturday Night
text: Clearing, with additional clouds north before dawn. Chilly with a chance for patchy frost. Lows in the upper 30s to mid 40s. North wind diminishing to light and variable.
